title: Giant Sightings
body:
![tittle ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bde29d683a6bc738ab150d88271c57336f17c1f.png)
**Yes! I've made a resource pack exclusively to change the model of a mob that doesn't spawn naturally, doesn't move and doesn't attack**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pPuzrrHfKgI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) required for it to work!**



![nametag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f483ef67b11ec495fb0abe040eabeab4dee793eb.png)**Special skins:**

**Name them "Friend" or "Nest" to get the birdies**

**Name them "Garden" or "Ancient" to get the grass**
